name: env-manager-ai
description: Env Manager Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: parse_env_file
tools.description: Parse .env file content and analyze variables.

tools.name: validate_env
tools.description: Validate .env against requirements. required: comma-separated keys. type_hints: KEY:type pairs (int,url,email,bool).

tools.name: generate_env_template
tools.description: Generate .env.example template from an existing .env file.

tools.name: compare_envs
tools.description: Compare two .env files and find differences.
